posts.title: hexo博客安装
posts.text: 1.安装指令： 12345npm install hexo-cli -ghexo init blogcd blognpm installhexo server 2.将博客生成静态站点 1hexo g 3 .生成的public文件夹就自己当成静态网站进行部署 hexo server:启动服务 4.自定义主题（网址）： https://hexo.io/themes/ 1git clone https://github.com/ZEROKISEKI/hexo-theme-cube.git themes/cube --depth 1 1npm install hexo-generator-json-content --save 5.图床（图片处理） ：七牛云 6）评论系统： disqus 来必力 7）搜索： swiftype 网站 npm换源：1npm install -g cnpm --registry=https://registry.npm.taobao.org 8）访问量的来源统计： 友盟： CNZZ 百度 9）上传到github： 为 Hexo 安装 Git 插件安装 hexo-deployer-git，否则会报 ERROR Deployer not found: git 的错误。npm install hexo-deployer-git --save 生成静态文件和部署：hexo g & d
posts.author: csm

posts.title: hexo添加评论功能-Gitment评论系统
posts.slug: hexo添加评论功能-Gitment评论系统
posts.text: 第一步：注册 OAuth Application 登录 Github。 前往 https://github.com/settings/profile 点击左侧下方的 Developer settings 点击绿色 Register a new application 填写以下内容： Application name：Gitment Homepage URL：https://ryanluoxu.github.io/ Application description：Blog comment system Authorization callback URL：https://ryanluoxu.github.io/ 12345678910111213147. 点击 `Register application`8. 得到： Client ID: Client Secret:- 第二步：创建存放 gitment-comments 的 repository1. 打开 D:\blog\themes\next_config.yml2. 找到 `Gitment`3. 如下修改： gitment: enable: true mint: true # RECOMMEND, A mint on Gitment, to support count, language and proxy_gateway count: true # Show comments count in post meta area lazy: false # Comments lazy loading with a button cleanly: false # Hide 'Powered by ...' on footer, and more language: # Force language, or auto switch by theme github_user: ryanluoxu # 此处 - Your Github ID github_repo: gitment-comments # 此处注意 - The repo you use to store Gitment comments client_id: xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx # 此处 - Github client id for the Gitment client_secret: xxxxxxxxxxxxx # 此处 - Github access secret token for the Gitment proxy_gateway: # Address of api proxy, See: https://github.com/aimingoo/intersect redirect_protocol: # Protocol of redirect_uri with force_redirect_protocol when mint enabled 12- 最后:之后生成并且部署才会生效，本地有时没有效果 hexo g -d ``` 之后文章底部会出现 初始化本文的评论页，点击初始化。
posts.author: csm

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
